attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
MBR_RM.APPLICATION_NAME,
MBR_RM.IAM_USER_KEY,
MBR_RM.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
MBR_RM.BK_CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT,
MBR_RM.INTERNAL_ROLE,
MBR_RM.EXTERNAL_ROLE,
MBR_RM.RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
MBR_RM.CCO_ID,
MBR_RM.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
MBR_RM.DD_BK_WORKER_TYPE_CD,    
CASE WHEN MBR_RM.DUMMY_USER_ROLE='Y' THEN MBR_RM.RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME ELSE MBR_RM.DD_CEC_ID END DD_CEC_ID ,
MBR_RM.RU_EXTERNAL_FLG,
MBR_RM.RU_INTERNAL_FLG,
MBR_RM.RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME,
MBR_RM.RU_EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR,
MBR_RM.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
MBR_RM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
MBR_RM.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
MBR_RM.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
MBR_RM.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
SHIER.DV_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_NUM_INT IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
MBR_RM.DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD ,
MBR_RM.DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME ,
SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR ,
MBR_RM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
MBR_RM.DUMMY_USER_ROLE,
MBR_RM.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
MBR_RM.EDW_CREATE_USER,
MBR_RM.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
MBR_RM.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
MBR_RM.START_TV_DT,
MBR_RM.END_TV_DT,
MBR_RM.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,
MBR_RM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
MBR_RM.AM_FLAG,
MTH.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
NSTA.SALES_TERR_ASSGN_TYPE_NAME
FROM 
(SELECT               
ISTL.APPLICATION_NAME,
ISTL.IAM_USER_KEY,
ISTL.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
ISTL.BK_CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT,
ISTL.INTERNAL_ROLE,
ISTL.EXTERNAL_ROLE,
ISTL.RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
ISTL.CCO_ID,
ISTL.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
ISTL.DD_BK_WORKER_TYPE_CD,    
ISTL.DD_CEC_ID,
ISTL.RU_EXTERNAL_FLG,
ISTL.RU_INTERNAL_FLG,
ISTL.RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME,
ISTL.RU_EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR,
ISTL.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
ISTL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
ISTL.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
ISTL.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
ISTL.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
ISTL.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
ISTL.DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD ,
ISTL.DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME ,
ISTL.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR ,
ISTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
ISTL.DUMMY_USER_ROLE,
ISTL.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
ISTL.EDW_CREATE_USER,
ISTL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
ISTL.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
ISTL.START_TV_DT,
ISTL.END_TV_DT,
ISTL.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,
CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(30)) SALES_REP_NUMBER,
'N'  AM_FLAG
FROM          
$$SECURITYVWDB.MT_IAM_SALESBO_SLS_TERR_LINK   ISTL,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
WHERE    
ISTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
AND ISTL.APPLICATION_NAME in ('My Business Report Tool','MBR Overlay')
MINUS
SELECT                   DISTINCT 
ISTL2.APPLICATION_NAME,
ISTL2.IAM_USER_KEY,
ISTL2.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
ISTL2.BK_CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT,
ISTL2.INTERNAL_ROLE,
ISTL2.EXTERNAL_ROLE,
ISTL2.RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
ISTL2.CCO_ID,
ISTL2.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
ISTL2.DD_BK_WORKER_TYPE_CD,    
ISTL2.DD_CEC_ID,
ISTL2.RU_EXTERNAL_FLG,
ISTL2.RU_INTERNAL_FLG,
ISTL2.RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME,
ISTL2.RU_EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR,
ISTL2.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
ISTL2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
ISTL2.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
ISTL2.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
ISTL2.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
ISTL2.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
ISTL2.DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD ,
ISTL2.DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME ,
ISTL2.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR ,
ISTL2.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
ISTL2.DUMMY_USER_ROLE,
ISTL2.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
ISTL2.EDW_CREATE_USER,
ISTL2.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
ISTL2.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
ISTL2.START_TV_DT,
ISTL2.END_TV_DT,
ISTL2.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,
CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(30)) SALES_REP_NUMBER,
'N'  AM_FLAG
FROM          
$$SECURITYVWDB.MT_IAM_SALESBO_SLS_TERR_LINK  ISTL1,
$$SECURITYVWDB.MT_IAM_SALESBO_SLS_TERR_LINK ISTL2,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_TV SH1,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_TV SH2
WHERE    ISTL1.APPLICATION_NAME in ('My Business Report Tool','MBR Overlay')
AND SH1.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND SH2.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND               ISTL1.DD_CEC_ID=ISTL2.DD_CEC_ID
AND       ISTL1.APPLICATION_NAME=ISTL2.APPLICATION_NAME
AND       ISTL1.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME=ISTL2.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
AND           ISTL1.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=SH1.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR_KEY
AND           ISTL1.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=ISTL2.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND               ISTL1.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR=SH1.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
AND               ISTL2.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR=SH2.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
AND               ISTL1.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR<>ISTL2.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
AND             ISTL1.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD = ISTL2.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD
AND               (SH1.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR =SH2.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
OR                     SH1.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR =SH2.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
OR                     SH1.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR =SH2.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
OR                     SH1.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR =SH2.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
OR                     SH1.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR =SH2.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
OR                     SH1.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR =SH2.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
OR                     SH1.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR =SH2.L7_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
OR                     SH1.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR =SH2.L8_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
OR                     SH1.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR =SH2.L9_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
OR                     SH1.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR =SH2.L10_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR)) MBR_RM,  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MTH, $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SHIER, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE NSTA
WHERE MBR_RM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MBR_RM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND NSTA.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD=MBR_RM.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD
UNION ALL
SELECT 
APPLICATION_NAME,
IAM_USER_KEY,
IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT,
INTERNAL_ROLE,
EXTERNAL_ROLE,
CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
CCO_ID,
WI_BUSS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
WI_BUSS.WORKER_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN DUMMY_USER_ROLE='Y' THEN IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME  ELSE CEC_ID  END CEC_ID  ,  
EXTERNAL_FLG,
INTERNAL_FLG,
IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME,
EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR,
IAM_ROLE_NAME,
WI_BUSS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
SHIER.DV_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_NUM_INT IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD ,
SALES_TERR_NAME ,
SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR ,
WI_BUSS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
DUMMY_USER_ROLE,
WI_BUSS.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
WI_BUSS.EDW_CREATE_USER,
WI_BUSS.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
WI_BUSS.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
START_TV_DT,
END_TV_DT,
SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,
SALES_REP_NUMBER,
AM_FLG,
RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
NSTA.SALES_TERR_ASSGN_TYPE_NAME
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_BUSMBRAM_SALES_TERR_LINK WI_BUSS,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SHIER,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE NSTA
WHERE    
WI_BUSS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
AND SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=WI_BUSS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND WI_BUSS.APPLICATION_NAME in ('MBR AM')
AND NSTA.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD=WI_BUSS.SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD
